arts.ttl: £20m price-tag revealed for midfielder linked with Birmingham City transfer
arts.sum: Rigg, 17, has scored four goals in 36 appearances for the Black Cats this term; under Regis Le Bris, they are well placed in the Championship play-offs and look set to have a crack at promotion to the Premier League following the culmination of the regular season in May. Blues were linked with a move for teenager Rigg back in September, following the closure of the summer transfer window, and now reports suggest Premier League West Ham United are also keeping an eye on proceedings.

arts.ttl: Preview: Birmingham City vs. Shrewsbury Town - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League One clash between Birmingham City and Shrewsbury Town, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Willumsson out, Leonard in as Birmingham City XI predicted for Shrewsbury
arts.sum: Michael Appleton will take charge of Shrewsbury in their third and final meeting with Blues after Ainsworth quit to take over at League Two Gillingham earlier this week. Blues have played Shrewsbury twice already, beating Paul Hurst’s side 4-0 in the Vertu Trophy in October, before losing 3-2 to Salop in Gareth Ainsworth’s first game in charge in late November.

arts.ttl: Michael Appleton admits Birmingham City can 'scare the life' out of Shrewsbury Town
arts.sum: Michael Appleton will try not to ‘scare the life’ out of his Shrewsbury Town players and instead remind them they have already beaten Birmingham City once this season. Michael Appleton admits Birmingham City can'scare the life' out of Shrewsbury Town

arts.ttl: Wanderers and Birmingham City both fined by FA after melee
arts.sum: Wanderers and Birmingham have been hit with fines from the FA after the melee at the Toughsheet Community Stadium earlier this month
